'''√z-j-p''' ('''kazajap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:culturalise|culturalise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-j-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:culturalise|culturalise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √z-j-p
|-
! Lemma
| kazajap
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thizajap || jizajap || shizajap || kizajap
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuzajap || jujuzajap || shushuzajap || kukuzajap
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuzajap || juzajap || shuzajap || kuzajap
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuzajap || juzajap || shuzajap || kuzajap
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thezajap || jezajap || shezajap || kezajap
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothozajap || jojozajap || shoshozajap || kokozajap
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thozajap || jozajap || shozajap || kozajap
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thozajap || jozajap || shozajap || kozajap
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || zajap || zajap || zajap || zajap
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || zajap || zajap || zajap || zajap
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || zajap || zajap || zajap || zajap
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || zajap || zajap || zajap || zajap
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæzajap || jæzajap || shæzajap || kæzajap
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathazajap || jajazajap || shashazajap || kakazajap
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thazajap || jazajap || shazajap || kazajap
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thazajap || jazajap || shazajap || kazajap
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shazajap
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshazajap
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishazajap
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shazajapnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshazajapnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishazajapnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shazajapshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshazajapnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishazajapshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shazajapro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshazajapnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishazajapro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shazajapmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshazajapnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishazajapmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shazajapsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshazajapnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishazajapsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shazajapng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshazajapnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishazajapng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shazajapya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshazajapnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishazajapya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shazajapyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshazajapnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishazajapyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shazajapnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshazajapnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishazajapnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shazajapnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazajapnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazajapnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shazajapnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshazajapnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazajapnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shazajapshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshazajapnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishazajapshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shazajapshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazajapnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazajapshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shazajapshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshazajapnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazajapshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shazajapronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshazajapnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishazajapronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shazajaproshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshazajapnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishazajaproshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shazajapromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshazajapnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazajapromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shazajapmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshazajapnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishazajapmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shazajapmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshazajapnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishazajapmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shazajapmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazajapnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazajapmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
